title: (Bullish Signal) TXG, Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend on May 03, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Over the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that TXG's AroonUp green line (see chart) is above 70, while the AroonDown red line is below 30. When the green line goes above 70 while the red line stays below 30, this is an indicator that the stock could be poised for a strong Uptrend. For traders, this could mean going long the stock or exploring call options in the next month. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 122 similar cases, 106 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 87%. Current price $183.23 crossed the resistance line at $186.73 and is trading between $186.73 resistance and $179.51 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/31/21 - 05/03/21, the price experienced a +6% Uptrend, while the week of 04/26/21 - 05/03/21 shows a -5% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/zuw32kr5t4x61.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=382b3e64fdfc6fedc84d6bd61762eaba22e31ebd

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

TXG moved above its 50-day Moving Average on March 31, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for TXG crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on April 06, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 2 of 2 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 90%.

Following a +0.29% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where TXG advanced for three days, in 95 of 104 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 90%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 106 of 122 cases where TXG Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 87%.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/10920056-10x-genomics-inc-ordinary-shares-s-txg-192-58-aroon-indicator-entered-an-uptrend-on-may-03-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
